title: anim_clips_v1
description: Compact per-bone keyframe animation. Channels target rig BONE NAMES, so one file animates every body skinned to the same rig profile. Angles in radians, translations in metres; root stays in place (no horizontal locomotion). See docs/generating_animation_data.md.

rig.description: rig profile id whose bone names these channels target (e.g. bird_v1, biped_v1)

clips.description: keyed by clip/state name (idle, walk, fly, attack, ...)

frames.description: sprite frames sampled per direction; equals the asset.json animations[state].frames

duration_frames.description: length of the 1-based authoring timeline the clip is sampled across; authoring-only, NOT carried into the asset manifest

bones.description: keyed by bone name; bones omitted stay at the bind pose. An empty map is a valid rest clip.
